title: Equipment Catalog Service
description: High-performance API for equipment inventory, availability checking, and self-service quoting.
details: Serve 533+ products across 24 categories with real-time availability checking, barcode/SKU lookup, image serving via S3/R2 CDN, and rate limiting per tenant.
test_strategy: Integration tests for CRUD, availability queries, rate limit enforcement.

title: Rental Management System (RMS)
description: Full replacement for Current RMS — bookings, projects, inventory, logistics, crew management.
details: Quote-to-project workflow, barcode scanning for check-out/check-in, crew scheduling, vehicle tracking, calendar integration.
test_strategy: Unit tests for state transitions, integration tests for gRPC services.

title: Finance Service
description: Invoicing, payments, AP/AR, payroll, multi-currency support.
details: Quote-to-invoice conversion, Stripe integration, automated payment reminders, AR aging reports, tax calculation.
test_strategy: Unit tests for calculations, integration tests for Stripe webhook handling.
